req.title: Hr-Admin updates performance-review
req.statement: An authenticated hr-admin shall be able to update a performance-review through the UI form. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

tests.name: naive_case

doc._raw_response:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for HR-Admin Performance Review Update functionality.

Requirement: An authenticated hr-admin shall be able to update a performance-review
through the UI form. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must
be written on success.
"""

import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from datetime import date, datetime
from uuid import uuid4

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def hr_admin_user():
    """Authenticated HR-Admin user."""
    return {
        "id": str(uuid4()),
        "username": "hr.admin@example.com",
        "role": "hr-admin",
        "is_authenticated": True,
        "is_active": True,
    }


@pytest.fixture
def non_hr_admin_user():
    """Authenticated user WITHOUT hr-admin role."""
    return {
        "id": str(uuid4()),
        "username": "employee@example.com",
        "role": "employee",
        "is_authenticated": True,
        "is_active": True,
    }


@pytest.fixture
def unauthenticated_user():
    """Unauthenticated (anonymous) user."""
    return {
        "id": None,
        "username": None,
        "role": None,
        "is_authenticated": False,
        "is_active": False,
    }


@pytest.fixture
def existing_review():
    """A performance review that already exists in the system."""
    return {
        "id": str(uuid4()),
        "employee_id": str(uuid4()),
        "reviewer_id": str(uuid4()),
        "review_period_start": date(2024, 1, 1),
        "review_period_end": date(2024, 6, 30),
        "rating": 3,
        "comments": "Original comments",
        "goals": "Original goals",
        "status": "draft",
        "created_at": datetime(2024, 7, 1, 9, 0, 0),
        "updated_at": datetime(2024, 7, 1, 9, 0, 0),
    }


@pytest.fixture
def valid_update_payload(existing_review):
    """All mandatory fields present and valid."
